text: hakim:4668 - Abt Bakr b. Ishaq > Muhammad b. Ayyab > ‘Amr b. al-Husayn al-Uqayli > Yahya b. al-'Ala al-Razi > Hilal b. AbG Humayd > ‘Abdullah b. As'ad b. Zurarah from his father [Machine] The Messenger of Allah £ said: It has been revealed to me regarding Ali three things, that he is the leader of the Muslims, the Imam of the righteous, and the commander of the brave warriors. @® - No Grade (Dhahabi)
